TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Nan-ci-cow "Ing a kamu, "Antarctica" u satimulan a kakitizaan, nan-pan-ciw satimulan a kakitizaan. u kakitizaay nu nan-ci. Nan-ci-cow hatu i lalabu nu na-ci-cin, u liwliw masaliyuk nu Nan-pin-yang. Śćóś•Ķśī≤ . nilaculan Nan-ci-cow sa u sasienaway nu ti-ciw, maacak, tunubali sa ku kakitizaan, uyza dada' mibalatay amiawas tu hamin a kenis nu cow, malalecad ka talakaw 2350 a depah, u satalakaway a cow nu palalecad tu nu kitakit. u hekal mahamin matahpu nu suleda kuli, macalap ku ti-ciway nu matahpuay nu kuli a helal ipabaw tu 80%.tukusay akakitizaan a mihcaan maselep tu 200 kunngli dada', labuay nu kanatal sangaleb adidi'. Cacay a mihcaan u sienaway a puu' Nan-ci-cow palalecad tu akuti' adidi'a katukuh-63‚ĄÉ, 1983a a mihcaan u piazih tu nikinsaan saadidiay a akuti-89.2‚ĄÉ. Nan-ci-cow u sakalima a kitizaan nu kitakit, ahebal nu hekal pakala tu 10 bn tu cacay. zikuz u nu Nan-ya, Bye-cow, Pey-beo-cow atu Nan-mye-cow, u sakatusa a kaahebal nu Tas- si-yang. caay ku Nan-ci-pan-taw dada' u saamisay hamin nu kakitizaan, hamin nu kakitizaan pakala tu paybun 1.9 ku-li ku matahpuay nu kuli. Nan-ciay a talu malatusa ku hekal, uzuma ungcuy atu kuli amin, zuma maawas tu nu ninel a gizice anucay nu batazd a gizice amatineng tu sasaay nu kuli. Low-s a bayu atu Wi-te-al a bayu, caspiay a hen-kwan-nan-ci a buyubuyu'an palatusa han ku Nan-ci-cw nutimulan a Nan-ci-cow atu satipan a Nan-ci-cow, uyni a buyu' matelek tu Ke-lin-ni-ce-u-syen, hami nu tanayu' 3000 tu kung-li. Nan-ci tabakiay a diheb u satabakiay a diheb nu kitakit, tini i Nan-ci-cow a lala' ni I-li-sa-yay, tayayu' u pakala tu 1,000 kung-li, zuma a kitizaan u i labu katukuh tu 1000 adepah. u ci-e sa tungusay zuma aadupan nu kitizaan nu Nan-ci, hina maazihay a ci-e pasu hwang-ti ci-e, kow-wang ci-e, A-teli-ci-e, Nan-ci ci-e atuPa-pu-ya a ci-e.mihatebuday i ungcu a ci-e liwliw nu mata mazekec ku banuh, mahapinang u micidekay kuheni. caaay ku mihatebuday i ungcung dada'angangan masaupu i likut nu Nan-ciay a Bu-ke-lan-cin-taw, u ci-e hatu i Nanci-cow siwawa mabuwah. zuma u hwang-ti a ci-e uyza dada' i Nan-ci-coway a ci-e kasienawan mulecuh mabuwah. u A-te-li a ci-e pikicapian tu timilan tu zumay a kitizaan muleceh mabuwah ku ci-e. Nan-ci micapi tu bayu mauzip yadah ku nu nanumay nu micucuay a aadupan, patinaku, i 18 katukuh 19 a mihecaan, Nan-ci a banuh katul nu bayuay a layun zayhan u banuh katul alaen nu makayniay i A-mey-lika atu Ing-kow a misebek mipatay tu bayuay a lukedaw, Wi-te bayuay a lukedaw tayza i Wi-te-al a bayu u sakaput mikeliday ci Tan-mu-s.Wi-te-al a ngangan a pangangan, mukanay tu kalang a lukeday nu bayu mauzip micapi tu bayu nu Nan-ci, hina maazihay tu papiingan nu laway siuning tu kalawlaway a singangan. . keyzay Á∂ďśŅü imahini Nan-ciay a keyzay mikawaw tini dada' miliyas tut ukus mibuting a kawaw atu caay kaahebalay a piliwkuan, nika tusaay a kawawan i tinidada' i likut nu Nan-ci. 1998 a mihca 7 a bulad i a demiad katukuh 1999 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 30 a demiadan, Nan-ci-cow a kayadah nu nibuting katukuh 119,898 tun. uyzasa, u miubiay mibuting pikiyadahan ku makuwanay mibuting kiyadahen tu lima katukuh enem ku kayadah. I 1998 a mihcaan Ba-kow atu Aw-ta-li saadidi'ay pabeli tu walu a babutingan pabeli tu cenbu tu niubian mibutingay a balunga'. 2000 katukuh 2001 a nihcaan, i Nan-ci-cow a bayuan mibuting katukuh tu 11,2934 kung-tun. zuma a kanalatal i Nan-ci-cow patizeng tu aenengan a migingkiw. i kasienawan, tini i Nan-ci-cow a kitizaan atu capiay a subal mikawaway tu ke-sye gingkiw anucaay uzuma malecaday a kawaw a tademaw izaw ku 1,000 ku tademaw, katukuh kalaludan pakala tu 5,000 ku tademaw, namahiza Nan-ci-coway a kakatuud nu tademaw i kasienawan atu kalaludan pasasizuma u paylasubu mang pin-hang-kung-li 70 ku tademaw atu 350 ku tademaw. katuud ku i pigingkuwan hamin a mihcaan izaw ku tademaw misebengay i Nan-ciay muenengay a tademaw tu kasienawan mikawaway lalid sa tu cacay a mihcaan a mikawaw. 2004 a mihcaan,E-low-say a Pey-lin-s-kaw-cin-can patizeng tu cacay E-low-s-cen kiwkayay a tulu cacay a kiwkay, paymihcaan a izaw ku cacay tusa ku mikawaway makakutay mmisabeng. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Nan-ci-cow inayi' ku Yincumin, inayi' ku matenesay mueneng a tademaw,saaca imahini ku katahekalan ku nasulitani i ayaw nu 19 se-ci izaw ku tademaw pakaazihay tu Nan-ci-co. nika, I kung-yen 1 se-ci hawsa, patahkal ci Tow-le-mi, ti-ciw u malalecaday tu, makay tuya malingatu, palatatenga' tu ku tademaw I bataday nutimjulan izaw ku "kaliyuhan a kakitizaan" izaw tu, palalecad tu nuamisan a Aow-cow, Ya-cow atu saamkisan a Bey-cow nuamisan a kakitizaan. katukah i 17 se-ci tu sazikuzay a mihcaan, mitahaway amin maazih ku Nan-mey-cow atu Ta-yang-cow caay ku nakamuanay a "Nan-ci kitizaan". itawyaay migingkiway tu hekal a lala' patatenga' anutimulan izaw ku cacay pikitabakian tu nu ayzaay a Nan-ci-cow a kakitizaan. 2002 a mihcaan, tini i Nan-cipan-taway a la-sen a kuli mapelad. 2008 a nihcaan 2 a bulad 28 a demiadan,tini I Nan-ci-pan-taw tu katimulanay a Wi-al-cin-s a kulian pakala tu 570 pin-bang-kung-li ku nu kuliay mapelad tu. u liwan15,000 pin-bang-kung-li ku kuli macukel nu cacay 6 ku-li a kaahebal, i lilis nu kapelaladan. 2009 a mihcaan 4 a bulad lima a demiad, uyni a kuli mahamin tu mapelad. Nan-ci a kakitizaan i paymihcaan a kasienawan macunus ku nanum nu bayu, kacunus nu nanum hatu i kalaludan malananum. uyni a kalakuli u nu nanum nu bayu, namahini mapawpaw i nanuman, duduc tu A-mey-lika a kanatal tu nipakatineng tu mikuwanay tu pahikukiay, 2005 a mihcaan, Nan-ci a kakitizaan hekalay a kuli i 30 a mihcaan u satabakiay a kalananum, cacay nu hekal atu A-mey-lika -Cya-li-bu-ni-ya-cow u kuli i pacena' malananum zikuz malakuli aca. uyni hakay sakahini u kakuti' nu tiniay katalakaw nu akuti' 5ňöC. i 2013 a mihcaan tahkal tu ku nipigingkiwan, satipan a Na-ci-coway tebanay hakay ti-ciway u sadadawaay a akuti nu kakitizaan. migingkiway a tademaw paazih tu nu Pow-te-can 1958 a mihcaan katukuh 2010 a mihcaan tu nikiluan tu lecad nu akuti'. misaheci tuyni a kakitizaan tu mihcaan tu lecad nu akuti' uyni a demiadan talakaw tu 2.4¬Ī1.2‚ĄÉ
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == nan- ¶i- ¶ow "iŇč a kamu, "antar ¶ti ¶a" u satimur~…ĺan a kakitizaan, nan-pan- ¶iw satimur~…ĺan a kakitizaan. u kakitizaaj nu nan- ¶i. nan- ¶i- ¶ow ńßatu i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu na- ¶i- ¶in, u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw masar~…ĺijuk nu nan-pin-jaŇč. *** . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nan- ¶i- ¶ow sa u sasi…ônawaj nu ti- ¶iw, maa ¶ak, tunubar~…ĺi sa ku kakitizaan, ujza dada Ē~ ° mibar~…ĺataj amiawas tu ńßamin a k…ônis nu ¶ow, mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ka tar~…ĺakaw **** a d…ôpańß, u satar~…ĺakawaj a ¶ow nu par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu kitakit. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mańßamin matańßpu nu sur~…ĺ…ôda kur~…ĺi, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ti- ¶iwaj nu matańßpuaj nu kur~…ĺi a ńß…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ipabaw tu **%.tukusaj akakitizaan a mińß ¶aan mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu *** kunŇčr~…ĺi dada Ē~ °, r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb adidi Ē~ °. ¶a ¶aj a ¶i tabakiaj a dińß…ôb u satabakiaj a dińß…ôb nu kitakit, tini i nan- ¶i- ¶ow a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ni i-r~…ĺi-sa-jaj, tajaju Ē~ ° u pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, zuma a kitizaan u i r~…ĺabu katukuńß tu **** ad…ôpańß. u ¶i-…ô sa tuŇčusaj zuma aadupan nu kitizaan nu nan- ¶i, ńßina maazińßaj a ¶i-…ô pasu ńßwaŇč-ti ¶i-…ô, kow-waŇč ¶i-…ô, a-t…ôr~…ĺi- ¶i-…ô, nan- ¶i ¶i-…ô atupa-pu-ja a ¶i-…ô.mińßat…ôbudaj ¶in-taw, u ¶i-…ô ńßatu i nan ¶i- ¶ow siwawa mabuwańß. zuma u ńßwaŇč-ti a ¶i-…ô ujza dada Ē~ ° i nan- ¶i- ¶owaj a ¶i-…ô kasi…ônawan mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß mabuwańß. u a-t…ô-r~…ĺi a ¶i-…ô piki ¶apian tu timir~…ĺan tu zumaj a kitizaan mur~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôńß mabuwańß ku ¶i-…ô. nan- ¶i mi ¶api tu baju mauzip jadańß ku nu nanumaj nu mi ¶u ¶uaj a aadupan, patinaku, i ** katukuńß ** a mińß…ô ¶aan, nan- ¶i a banuńß katur~…ĺ nu bajuaj a r~…ĺajun zajńßan u banuńß katur~…ĺ ar~…ĺa…ôn nu makajniaj i a-m…ô-r~…ĺika atu iŇč-kow a mis…ôb…ôk mipataj tu bajuaj a r~…ĺuk…ôdaw, wi-t…ô bajuaj a r~…ĺuk…ôdaw tajza i wi-t…ô-ar~…ĺ a baju u sakaput mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i tan-mu-s.wi-t…ô-ar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan a paŇčaŇčan, mukanaj tu kar~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuk…ôdaj nu baju mauzip mi ¶api tu baju nu nan- ¶i, ńßina maazińßaj tu papiiŇčan nu r~…ĺawaj ujzasa, u miubiaj mibutiŇč pikijadańßan ku makuwanaj mibutiŇč kijadańß…ôn tu r~…ĺima katukuńß …ôn…ôm ku kajadańß. i **** a mińß ¶aan ba-kow atu aw-ta-r~…ĺi saadidi Ē~ °aj pab…ôr~…ĺi tu war~…ĺu a babutiŇčan pab…ôr~…ĺi tu ¶…ônbu tu niubian mibutiŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ °. **** katukuńß **** a nińß ¶aan, i nan- ¶i- ¶ow a bajuan mibutiŇč katukuńß tu **,**** kuŇč-tun. zuma a kanar~…ĺatar~…ĺ i nan- *,*** ku tad…ômaw, katukuńß kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** ku tad…ômaw, namańßiza nan- ¶i- ¶owaj a kakatuud nu tad…ômaw i kasi…ônawan atu kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan pasasizuma u pajr~…ĺasubu maŇč pin-ńßaŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi ** ku tad…ômaw atu *** ku tad…ômaw. katuud ku i pigiŇčkuwan ńßamin a mińß ¶aan izaw ku tad…ômaw mis…ôb…ôŇčaj i nan- ¶iaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw tu kasi…ônawan mikawawaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan a mikawaw. **** a mińß ¶aan,…ô-r~…ĺow-saj a p…ô-r~…ĺin-s-kaw- ¶in- ¶an patiz…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj …ô-r~…ĺow-s- ¶…ôn kiwkajaj a tur~…ĺu ¶a ¶aj a kiwkaj, pajmińß ¶aan a izaw ku ¶a ¶aj tusa ku mikawawaj makakutaj mmisab…ôŇč. . r~…ĺikisi ** nan- ¶i- ¶ow inaji Ē~ ° ku jin ¶umin, inaji Ē~ ° ku mat…ôn…ôsaj mu…ôn…ôŇč a tad…ômaw,saa ¶a imańßini ku katańß…ôkar~…ĺan ku nasur~…ĺitani i ajaw nu ** s…ô- ¶i izaw ku tad…ômaw pakaazińßaj tu nan- ¶i- ¶o. nika, i kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i ńßawsa, patańßkar~…ĺ ¶i tow-r~…ĺ…ô-mi, ti- ¶iw u mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu, makaj tuja mar~…ĺiŇčatu, par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° tu ku tad…ômaw i batadaj nutimjur~…ĺan izaw ku "kar~…ĺijuńßan a kakitizaan" izaw tu, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nuamisan a aow- ¶ow, ja- ¶ow atu saamkisan a b…ô- ¶ow nuamisan a kakitizaan. katukańß i ** s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan, mitańßawaj amin maazińß ku nan-m…ô- ¶ow atu ta-jaŇč- ¶ow ¶aaj ku nakamuanaj a "nan- ¶i kitizaan". itawjaaj migiŇčkiwaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° anutimur~…ĺan izaw ku ¶a ¶aj pikitabakian tu nu ajzaaj a nan- ¶i- ¶ow a kakitizaan. **** a mińß ¶aan, tini i nan- ¶ipan-tawaj a r~…ĺa-s…ôn a kur~…ĺi map…ôr~…ĺad. **** a nińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiadan,tini i nan- ¶i-pan-taw tu katimur~…ĺanaj a wi-ar~…ĺ- ¶in-s a kur~…ĺian pakar~…ĺa tu *** pin-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku nu kur~…ĺiaj map…ôr~…ĺad tu. u r~…ĺiwan**,*** pin-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku kur~…ĺi ma ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ nu ¶a ¶aj * ku-r~…ĺi a kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ, i r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu kap…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺadan. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad r~…ĺima a d…ômiad, ujni a kur~…ĺi mańßamin tu map…ôr~…ĺad. nan- ¶i a kakitizaan i pajmińß ¶aan a kasi…ônawan ma ¶unus ku nanum nu baju, ka ¶unus nu nanum ńßatu i kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan mar~…ĺananum. ujni a kar~…ĺakur~…ĺi u nu nanum nu baju, namańßini mapawpaw i nanuman, dudu ¶ tu a-m…ô-r~…ĺika a kanatar~…ĺ tu nipakatin…ôŇč tu mikuwanaj tu pańßikukiaj, **** a mińß ¶aan, nan- ¶i a kakitizaan ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kur~…ĺi i ** a mińß ¶aan u satabakiaj a kar~…ĺananum, ¶a ¶aj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu a-m…ô-r~…ĺika - ¶ja-r~…ĺi-bu-ni-ja- ¶ow u kur~…ĺi i pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° mar~…ĺananum zikuz mar~…ĺakur~…ĺi a ¶a. ujni ńßakaj sakańßini u kakuti Ē~ ° nu tiniaj katar~…ĺakaw nu akuti Ē~ ° ** ¶. i **** a mińß ¶aan tańßkar~…ĺ tu ku nipigiŇčkiwan, satipan a na- ¶i- ¶owaj t…ôbanaj ńßakaj ti- ¶iwaj u sadadawaaj a akuti nu kakitizaan. migiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw paazińß tu nu pow-t…ô- ¶an **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan tu nikir~…ĺuan tu r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu akuti Ē~ °. misańß…ô ¶i tujni a kakitizaan tu mińß ¶aan tu r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu akuti Ē~ ° ujni a d…ômiadan tar~…ĺakaw tu *.***.**
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Nan-ci-cow "Ing a kamu, "Antarctica" u satimulan a kakitizaan, nan-pan-ciw satimulan a kakitizaan. u kakitizaay nu nan-ci. Nan-ci-cow hatu i lalabu nu na-ci-cin, u liwliw masaliyuk nu Nan-pin-yang. Śćóś•Ķśī≤ . nilaculan Nan-ci-cow sa u sasienaway nu ti-ciw, maacak, tunubali sa ku kakitizaan, uyza dada' mibalatay amiawas tu hamin a kenis nu cow, malalecad ka talakaw 2350 a depah, u satalakaway a cow nu palalecad tu nu kitakit. u hekal mahamin matahpu nu suleda kuli, macalap ku ti-ciway nu matahpuay nu kuli a helal ipabaw tu 80%.tukusay akakitizaan a mihcaan maselep tu 200 kunngli dada', labuay nu kanatal sangaleb adidi'. Cacay a mihcaan u sienaway a puu' Nan-ci-cow palalecad tu akuti' adidi'a katukuh-63‚ĄÉ, 1983a a mihcaan u piazih tu nikinsaan saadidiay a akuti-89.2‚ĄÉ. Nan-ci-cow u sakalima a kitizaan nu kitakit, ahebal nu hekal pakala tu 10 bn tu cacay. zikuz u nu Nan-ya, Bye-cow, Pey-beo-cow atu Nan-mye-cow, u sakatusa a kaahebal nu Tas- si-yang. caay ku Nan-ci-pan-taw dada' u saamisay hamin nu kakitizaan, hamin nu kakitizaan pakala tu paybun 1.9 ku-li ku matahpuay nu kuli. Nan-ciay a talu malatusa ku hekal, uzuma ungcuy atu kuli amin, zuma maawas tu nu ninel a gizice anucay nu batazd a gizice amatineng tu sasaay nu kuli. Low-s a bayu atu Wi-te-al a bayu, caspiay a hen-kwan-nan-ci a buyubuyu'an palatusa han ku Nan-ci-cw nutimulan a Nan-ci-cow atu satipan a Nan-ci-cow, uyni a buyu' matelek tu Ke-lin-ni-ce-u-syen, hami nu tanayu' 3000 tu kung-li. Nan-ci tabakiay a diheb u satabakiay a diheb nu kitakit, tini i Nan-ci-cow a lala' ni I-li-sa-yay, tayayu' u pakala tu 1,000 kung-li, zuma a kitizaan u i labu katukuh tu 1000 adepah. u ci-e sa tungusay zuma aadupan nu kitizaan nu Nan-ci, hina maazihay a ci-e pasu hwang-ti ci-e, kow-wang ci-e, A-teli-ci-e, Nan-ci ci-e atuPa-pu-ya a ci-e.mihatebuday i ungcu a ci-e liwliw nu mata mazekec ku banuh, mahapinang u micidekay kuheni. caaay ku mihatebuday i ungcung dada'angangan masaupu i likut nu Nan-ciay a Bu-ke-lan-cin-taw, u ci-e hatu i Nanci-cow siwawa mabuwah. zuma u hwang-ti a ci-e uyza dada' i Nan-ci-coway a ci-e kasienawan mulecuh mabuwah. u A-te-li a ci-e pikicapian tu timilan tu zumay a kitizaan muleceh mabuwah ku ci-e. Nan-ci micapi tu bayu mauzip yadah ku nu nanumay nu micucuay a aadupan, patinaku, i 18 katukuh 19 a mihecaan, Nan-ci a banuh katul nu bayuay a layun zayhan u banuh katul alaen nu makayniay i A-mey-lika atu Ing-kow a misebek mipatay tu bayuay a lukedaw, Wi-te bayuay a lukedaw tayza i Wi-te-al a bayu u sakaput mikeliday ci Tan-mu-s.Wi-te-al a ngangan a pangangan, mukanay tu kalang a lukeday nu bayu mauzip micapi tu bayu nu Nan-ci, hina maazihay tu papiingan nu laway siuning tu kalawlaway a singangan. . keyzay Á∂ďśŅü imahini Nan-ciay a keyzay mikawaw tini dada' miliyas tut ukus mibuting a kawaw atu caay kaahebalay a piliwkuan, nika tusaay a kawawan i tinidada' i likut nu Nan-ci. 1998 a mihca 7 a bulad i a demiad katukuh 1999 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 30 a demiadan, Nan-ci-cow a kayadah nu nibuting katukuh 119,898 tun. uyzasa, u miubiay mibuting pikiyadahan ku makuwanay mibuting kiyadahen tu lima katukuh enem ku kayadah. I 1998 a mihcaan Ba-kow atu Aw-ta-li saadidi'ay pabeli tu walu a babutingan pabeli tu cenbu tu niubian mibutingay a balunga'. 2000 katukuh 2001 a nihcaan, i Nan-ci-cow a bayuan mibuting katukuh tu 11,2934 kung-tun. zuma a kanalatal i Nan-ci-cow patizeng tu aenengan a migingkiw. i kasienawan, tini i Nan-ci-cow a kitizaan atu capiay a subal mikawaway tu ke-sye gingkiw anucaay uzuma malecaday a kawaw a tademaw izaw ku 1,000 ku tademaw, katukuh kalaludan pakala tu 5,000 ku tademaw, namahiza Nan-ci-coway a kakatuud nu tademaw i kasienawan atu kalaludan pasasizuma u paylasubu mang pin-hang-kung-li 70 ku tademaw atu 350 ku tademaw. katuud ku i pigingkuwan hamin a mihcaan izaw ku tademaw misebengay i Nan-ciay muenengay a tademaw tu kasienawan mikawaway lalid sa tu cacay a mihcaan a mikawaw. 2004 a mihcaan,E-low-say a Pey-lin-s-kaw-cin-can patizeng tu cacay E-low-s-cen kiwkayay a tulu cacay a kiwkay, paymihcaan a izaw ku cacay tusa ku mikawaway makakutay mmisabeng. . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Nan-ci-cow inayi' ku Yincumin, inayi' ku matenesay mueneng a tademaw,saaca imahini ku katahekalan ku nasulitani i ayaw nu 19 se-ci izaw ku tademaw pakaazihay tu Nan-ci-co. nika, I kung-yen 1 se-ci hawsa, patahkal ci Tow-le-mi, ti-ciw u malalecaday tu, makay tuya malingatu, palatatenga' tu ku tademaw I bataday nutimjulan izaw ku "kaliyuhan a kakitizaan" izaw tu, palalecad tu nuamisan a Aow-cow, Ya-cow atu saamkisan a Bey-cow nuamisan a kakitizaan. katukah i 17 se-ci tu sazikuzay a mihcaan, mitahaway amin maazih ku Nan-mey-cow atu Ta-yang-cow caay ku nakamuanay a "Nan-ci kitizaan". itawyaay migingkiway tu hekal a lala' patatenga' anutimulan izaw ku cacay pikitabakian tu nu ayzaay a Nan-ci-cow a kakitizaan. 2002 a mihcaan, tini i Nan-cipan-taway a la-sen a kuli mapelad. 2008 a nihcaan 2 a bulad 28 a demiadan,tini I Nan-ci-pan-taw tu katimulanay a Wi-al-cin-s a kulian pakala tu 570 pin-bang-kung-li ku nu kuliay mapelad tu. u liwan15,000 pin-bang-kung-li ku kuli macukel nu cacay 6 ku-li a kaahebal, i lilis nu kapelaladan. 2009 a mihcaan 4 a bulad lima a demiad, uyni a kuli mahamin tu mapelad. Nan-ci a kakitizaan i paymihcaan a kasienawan macunus ku nanum nu bayu, kacunus nu nanum hatu i kalaludan malananum. uyni a kalakuli u nu nanum nu bayu, namahini mapawpaw i nanuman, duduc tu A-mey-lika a kanatal tu nipakatineng tu mikuwanay tu pahikukiay, 2005 a mihcaan, Nan-ci a kakitizaan hekalay a kuli i 30 a mihcaan u satabakiay a kalananum, cacay nu hekal atu A-mey-lika -Cya-li-bu-ni-ya-cow u kuli i pacena' malananum zikuz malakuli aca. uyni hakay sakahini u kakuti' nu tiniay katalakaw nu akuti' 5ňöC. i 2013 a mihcaan tahkal tu ku nipigingkiwan, satipan a Na-ci-coway tebanay hakay ti-ciway u sadadawaay a akuti nu kakitizaan. migingkiway a tademaw paazih tu nu Pow-te-can 1958 a mihcaan katukuh 2010 a mihcaan tu nikiluan tu lecad nu akuti'. misaheci tuyni a kakitizaan tu mihcaan tu lecad nu akuti' uyni a demiadan talakaw tu 2.4¬Ī1.2‚ĄÉ
